message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Duisburger Viktimisierungssurvey 2003","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4442","justification":"City‐level victimisation survey in Duisburg focusing on crime, fear of crime, police evaluation, and neighbourhood characteristics; directly matches 'Crime and law enforcement', 'Community, urban and rural life', 'Social behaviour and attitudes' in the 2000s."},{"title":"Duisburger Viktimisierungssurvey 2006","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4443","justification":"Follow‐up victimisation survey in Duisburg with similar focus on crime experiences, safety perceptions, and local environment; covers 'Crime and law enforcement', 'Community, urban and rural life', and 'Social behaviour and attitudes' in the mid‑2000s."},{"title":"Duisburger Viktimisierungssurvey 2009","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4444","justification":"Later wave of the Duisburg victimisation surveys, again centred on crime, law enforcement, and neighbourhood context; strongly aligned with 'Crime and law enforcement', 'Community, urban and rural life', 'Social behaviour and attitudes' for the late 2000s."},{"title":"Sicherheitsbefragung Duisburg 2001","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4441","justification":"Safety survey in Duisburg examining perceptions of security, fear of crime, satisfaction with police, and local social environment; relevant to 'Crime and law enforcement', 'Community, urban and rural life', and 'Social behaviour and attitudes' early in the 2000s."},{"title":"Kinder- und Jugendkriminalität in Duisburg 2003","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4445","justification":"Study on child and youth delinquency in Duisburg, focusing on offending, victimisation, family and peer context; links to 'Crime and law enforcement', 'PSYCHOLOGY', 'Family life and marriage', and 'Social behaviour and attitudes' in the early 2000s."},{"title":"Städtevergleich Kriminalität: Duisburg und andere Ruhrgebietsstädte 2004","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4446","justification":"Comparative study including Duisburg and other cities in the Ruhr area on crime rates, fear of crime, and policing; relevant for 'Crime and law enforcement', 'Community, urban and rural life', and 'Social behaviour and attitudes' mid‑2000s."},{"title":"Sozialraumanalyse Duisburg-Marxloh 2005","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4447","justification":"Neighbourhood‐level social space analysis in Duisburg‑Marxloh, including social cohesion, disorder, and safety; fits 'Community, urban and rural life', 'Social behaviour and attitudes', and indirectly 'Crime and law enforcement' in the 2000s."},{"title":"Sport und Integration in Duisburg 2007","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5092","justification":"Survey on sport participation and social integration in Duisburg, with focus on leisure activities, neighbourhood, and social relations; addresses 'Leisure, tourism and sport', 'Community, urban and rural life', and 'Social behaviour and attitudes' in the 2000s."},{"title":"Berufliche Bildung und Übergang in den Arbeitsmarkt in Duisburg 2008","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5093","justification":"Study on vocational education, training pathways, and entry into employment among young people in Duisburg; matches 'Vocational education and training' and 'Employment' in the late 2000s."},{"title":"Zeitverwendung und Alltagsorganisation in Duisburg 2002","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5094","justification":"Household and individual survey in Duisburg on daily schedules, work, family, and leisure; links to 'Time use', 'Family life and marriage', 'Leisure, tourism and sport', and 'Employment' in the early 2000s."}]}
